calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Continued To Jan-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Karla Davis.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Keith Hamby individually and dba DH Trucking & Grading as follows:
Damages $62,573.35
Atty fee $2,500.00
Interest $3,085.20
Costs $495.50
Total judgment $68,653.55.
Plaintiff is also awarded possession of leased equipment, upon sale of which, defendant shall receive credit from the proceeds. (See scanned document for details of judgment.)
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Continued To Dec-08-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2006 Off Calendar
